channel.title: Ai on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on ZAP

item.title: Vibe Coding Security Fixes
item.description: ZAP now has a “Generate Fix Prompt” option that copies everything an LLM needs to fix a vulnerability straight to your clipboard. Also: ZAP was run 9.5 million times in March. Vibe coding, anyone?

item.title: The ZAP MCP Server
item.description: Connect AI assistants like Claude and ChatGPT to ZAP via the Model Context Protocol. Start scans, read alerts, and explore your application—all through natural conversation.
